dialogueChunks.intro: Ha! Look at you, walking in like a conquering hero! And rightfully so!
dialogueChunks.plotStep: I knew you had it in you, {player_name}. The {quest_item} is secured, {quest_focus} is cleared, and {target_npc} is already telling everyone about what we accomplished. You managed to {quest_action} against all odds.
dialogueChunks.outro: Your share of the spoils, as promised. And if you ever want to chase another impossible dream, you know where to find me.

playerResponses.text: Best partnership I've had in years. Until next time.
The treasure was worth the trouble. Barely.
Just hand over my cut and we'll call it even.

dialogueChunks.intro: You're alive. After what happened in there, I honestly didn't expect to see you again.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: We managed to {quest_action}, yes, but the cost... {target_npc} didn't make it out. {quest_focus} collapsed behind you, sealing everything else inside. The enterprise succeeded by the narrowest of margins, and I find myself wondering if {quest_stakes} were worth the price.
dialogueChunks.outro: Take your share. You earned every piece of it and then some. I need time to think about whether I'll ever attempt something like this again.

playerResponses.text: We knew the risks going in. {target_npc} did too.
Some victories leave scars. This is one of them.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}! Come here, come here! You won't believe what's happened!
dialogueChunks.plotStep: Word of our enterprise has spread like wildfire! Merchants from three settlements are already bidding on what we recovered from {quest_focus}. {target_npc} brokered a deal that will fund a dozen more expeditions. Your name is on everyone's lips: the adventurer who dared to {quest_action} and came back with proof.
dialogueChunks.outro: Here's your share from the initial sale. And mark my words: this is just the beginning. You and I are going to do great things.

playerResponses.text: Fame and fortune in one trip? I could get used to this.
The money is nice, but the adventure was the real reward.
I'll let you handle the fame. Just keep my share coming.

dialogueChunks.intro: Well, {player_name}. We actually pulled it off. I still can't quite believe it.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The {quest_item} from {quest_focus} is secured, catalogued, and already drawing interest from buyers across three territories. {target_npc} says the scholarly value alone would fund a university. {quest_stakes} turned out to be everything we hoped and more.
dialogueChunks.outro: Your share, as agreed. And between you and me: I'm already planning the next one. You'll be the first person I call.

playerResponses.text: Call anytime. I live for this kind of work.
Next time, better intel. But yes, I'm in.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, before I hand over your reward, I want to say something I don't say often.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: I was wrong about the difficulty. I told you it would be dangerous and I undersold it by half. You went into {quest_focus}, fought things I couldn't have imagined, and came back carrying the {quest_item} like it was nothing. {target_npc} is writing a full account of how you managed to {quest_action}, and I made sure your name is on every page.
dialogueChunks.outro: Take this. It's more than we originally agreed, because you delivered more than anyone could have expected.

playerResponses.text: I appreciate you owning that. It was harder than advertised.
Keep the account. The extra pay is thanks enough.

dialogueChunks.intro: Gather round, everyone! The hero of the hour has returned!
dialogueChunks.plotStep: I hope you don't mind an audience, {player_name}, because half the settlement turned out to see the {quest_item} you recovered from {quest_focus}. {target_npc} has been telling the story to anyone who'll listen. You went where no one else would go and brought back proof that {quest_stakes} were real.
dialogueChunks.outro: Your cut of the profits, plus a bonus from {target_npc}'s personal funds. They insisted.

playerResponses.text: Tell the story however you want. I know what really happened.
The legends were real, and now I'm part of them. Not a bad outcome.

dialogueChunks.intro: You made it. I'll confess, {player_name}: there was a moment when I thought you wouldn't.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: We managed to {quest_action}, but the cost was high. We lost half our supplies, the maps are destroyed, and the route back is sealed permanently. But the {quest_item}? Safe in hand. {target_npc} says it's the finest specimen they've ever examined. Sometimes the greatest discoveries come at the steepest price.
dialogueChunks.outro: Your full share, without deductions. You risked everything, and you deserve every bit of it.

playerResponses.text: Worth it. Even with the close calls.
Let's never do anything like that again. Unless the pay is even better.

dialogueChunks.intro: Ha! There's the look of someone who just accomplished the impossible! Come here, {player_name}!
dialogueChunks.plotStep: Every single thing we planned for went sideways, and you still managed to {quest_action}. The {enemy_type} were fiercer than expected, {quest_focus} was worse than the maps showed, and the {quest_item} was harder to extract than anyone predicted. And yet here you stand with the prize in hand. {target_npc} is already in talks with collectors and the bidding war is driving the price through the roof.
dialogueChunks.outro: Here's your share of the advance payment. There'll be more once the final sale closes. You and I make a spectacular team.

playerResponses.text: Impossible is just a word. When do we go again?
A spectacular team with spectacular bruises. But yes, I'll take my cut.
